ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the player */,
  "world" TEXT /* World or server where the player is located */,
  "data_center" TEXT /* Data center associated with the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "points_delta" INTEGER /* Change in points since the last update */,
  "portrait" TEXT /* URL of the player's portrait image */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Tier classification of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins achieved by the player */,
  "wins_delta" INTEGER /* Change in wins since the last update */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job or role of the player in the game */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the player data was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* URLs to the player's social media profiles */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the player */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_world FOREIGN KEY ("world") REFERENCES worlds ("world_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_job FOREIGN KEY ("job") REFERENCES jobs ("job_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_tier FOREIGN KEY ("tier") REFERENCES tiers ("tier_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "worlds" (
  "world_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each world */,
  "world_name" TEXT /* Name of the world */,
  "data_center" TEXT /* Data center associated with the world */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the world (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the world */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the world was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the world data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier (e.g., Crystal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the tier data was updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the tier's icon image */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job (e.g., DRG, DNC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the job data was updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the job's icon image */,
  "recommended_equipment" TEXT /* Recommended equipment for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., Rank 1) */,
  "min_points" INTEGER /* Minimum points required for the rank */,
  "max_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points achievable for the rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rank was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the rank data was updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the rank's icon image */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in seconds */,
  "points_gain" INTEGER /* Points gained after the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., PvP, PvE) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was part of */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the match data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins recorded by the player */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses recorded by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player in matches */,
  "average_points_per_match" TEXT /* Average points scored per match */,
  "best_match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the best match */,
  "worst_match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the worst match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the statistics data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each points change record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose points changed */,
  "points_change" INTEGER /* Points change amount (positive or negative) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the points change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the points change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the points change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the points history data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email associated with the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last time the password was changed */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is an admin */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for logging in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
